name: Anhui Korrun Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Korrun Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various travel luggage products worldwide. Its products include backpacks, briefcases, and sleeves; templates of smartphones and PADs; luggage; and outdoor and sports products. The company offers its products under the 90FUN and GUILDFORD brands. Anhui Korrun Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Chuzhou, China.
